label: Other Programs
title: Specialty Mortgage Programs
metaDescription: Cash-back, bad-credit, no-commitment, reverse mortgages and complex mortgage structures across Greater Vancouver and Canada. Niche solutions when standard programs don't fit.
intro: When a standard A-lender file doesn't fit, there are still solutions — cash-back products, bruised-credit programs, fully-open mortgages, reverse mortgages for 55+ owners, and tailored complex structures.
body: Most lender shopping happens in the prime A-lender world. But about a quarter of files I work on need something else: a credit rebuild, a fully-open structure for a short hold period, a reverse mortgage to convert equity into retirement income, or a multi-property structure with cross-collateral. The ten pages in this section cover the most common 'what if my situation isn't standard' questions.

highlights.title: Bruised-credit programs
highlights.description: B-lenders and credit unions accept Equifax scores in the 580–640 range that A-lenders won't touch.

highlights.title: Reverse mortgage to age 95+
highlights.description: Up to 55% of home value tax-free, no monthly payments, no income or credit qualification required.

highlights.title: Complex multi-property
highlights.description: Cross-collateralized, blanket and corporate-owned mortgage structures for sophisticated borrowers.
